testcase.name: shouldNotReturnDeletedUser
testcase.system-out:

{"@timestamp":"2026-03-09T12:16:41.5785143-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
 select
 u1_0.id,
 u1_0.created_at,

testcase.name: findByEmailIgnoreCaseAndDeletedAtIsNull_ShouldReturnUser
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: shouldNotAllowDuplicateEmail
existsByEmailIgnoreCaseAndDeletedAtIsNull_ShouldReturnTrue
findByEmailIgnoreCaseAndDeletedAtIsNull_ShouldReturnEmpty
testcase.system-out:
